workshoptitle: Build a Data Lake with Oracle Autonomous AI Lakehouse - Edition 2

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: This is the prerequisites for customers using Free Trial and Paid tenancies.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Set up the Workshop Environment [current]
tutorials.description: This lab walks you through the required and optional tasks to setup your workshop environment.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Query data from OCI Object Storage using Resource Principal in the UI [current & new]
tutorials.description: This lab walks you through how to load local data into your ADW instance.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Access AWS S3 using Access Key and Secret Key with PL/SQL (demo) [current]
tutorials.description: This lab walks you through how to load local data into your ADW instance.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Query an Apache Iceberg table from Oracle (example) [current]
tutorials.description: This lab shows you how to query Iceberg tables in ADW.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Consume a shared dataset using Delta Sharing protocol [current]
tutorials.description: This lab shows you how ADW supports Public Data Share.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Federated Catalog with Oracle Autonomous AI Lakehouse [new - Mike Mathews]
Lab 8: Accelerating queries with Data Lake Accelerator [new]
Lab 12: Query from Excel using the ADB Excel add-in (Demo) [current???]
tutorials.description: This lab walks you through how to use the Table AI Assist Tool.

tutorials.title: Lab 13: Multi-model querying in one place (Demo) [current & new]
tutorials.description: This lab shows you how ADW supports multiple languages

tutorials.title: Lab 14: Share data from Oracle Autonomous AI Lakehouse (Hands-on) [current & new]
tutorials.description: Part 1, Live Share (Oracle-to-Oracle), Part 2, Delta Sharing (provider), Part 3, Table Hyperlink

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to Common Problems and Directions for Receiving Live Help
